_comment: Hand-derived (implementation-plan.md fixtures rule, WP-11), same envelope assumption as steps.json (see its _comment). Height is a Sample (S) type per base-knowledge.md §3; value key `height.meters` (field name assumed; meters chosen to match HealthKit's own base unit for this identifier, avoiding an unconfirmed cm/in conversion -- same posture as WP-07's weight-unit note). Manual entry, Fitbit Aria Air, matching weight.json's device/source pairing. Mirrored in SyncKit's TypeMapperFixtures.heightPoint().
